tools.name: addPassword.addPasswordV1
tools.description: Protect a PDF document with a password. Encrypt the PDF document to prevent unauthorized access.

tools.name: addRestrictions.addRestrictionsV1
tools.description: Add restrictions to prevent copying, printing, and modifying a PDF document.

tools.name: addWatermark.addImageWatermarkV1
tools.description: Add an image watermark to each page of a PDF document.

tools.name: addWatermark.addTextWatermarkV1
tools.description: Add a text watermark to each page of a PDF document. Choose from several watermark templates.

tools.name: extractPages.extractPagesV1
tools.description: Extract one or more pages from a PDF document.

tools.name: mergeDocuments.mergeDocumentsV1
tools.description: Combine multiple PDF documents into a single PDF document.

tools.name: removePages.removePagesV1
tools.description: Remove one or more pages from a PDF document.

tools.name: removePassword.removePasswordV1
tools.description: Remove the password from an encrypted PDF document. The PDF document will no longer require a password to open.

tools.name: removeRestrictions.removeRestrictionsV1
tools.description: Remove all the restrictions from a PDF document.

tools.name: removeSignatures.removeSignaturesV1
tools.description: Remove the cryptographic signatures and timestamps from a PDF document.

tools.name: reversePages.reversePagesV1
tools.description: Reverse the order of the pages of a PDF document.

tools.name: rotatePages.rotatePagesV1
tools.description: Rotate one or more pages in a PDF document.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
